## Experiment #30

A polysulfone membrane was synthesized using an automated non-solvent-induced phase separation (NIPS) process. The polymer solution (16.0% polysulfone in PolarClean solvent) was prepared using the robotic mixing system at room temperature (25??C) without additional heating.
